schema: Same as input/round1 and round2 (TheHive-style alert JSON)
scenario: Same campaigns and noise as round 1/2 but stretched across 6 months to measure temporal dilation effect on agent correlation.
timeline: All 100 alerts are distributed across Jul-Dec 2024 with noise, finance-ransomware activity, and HR insider-exfil activity intentionally mixed in time.
source_convention: source uses real product names, such as Cortex XDR, Google Workspace Security, Netskope, and CrowdStrike Falcon.
tag_convention: tags contains exactly one value: the same product name used in source.
source_ref_policy: Deterministic UUIDs generated from round3 namespace for stability across regenerations.
